calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Nov-18-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on calendar this day for hearing on Petition Changing Name. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patrick Heald. Petitioner is sworn and examined. The Court grants the decree changing name to Shanta-Susan Ng. Decree signed in open court.
